Petition For Approval Of Creditors Claim For Personal Representative
Off Calendar Nov-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deb Fox, via ZOOM, for Nicole Wilder, Personal Representative.

The court asks counsel if she has seen the most recent Examiner's notes. Counsel offers oral testimony regarding probate code 9100, probate code 366.2, and probate code 10552. Counsel advises that no heir at law has filed an objection and the financial hardship caused to her client if the court denies the petition.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Approval of Creditors Claim for Personal Representative is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
